note: Authority-anchored comprehension queries for the Iliad-quest workflow contract. They encode the misconceptions codex named: that The Iliad is a bookend (not the quest), that the new documentation stage is enforced, that repo-proximity equals enrollment, and that this advisory record itself enforces the order. Governing authority is the active plan (context); this record does not change it.

queries.query: Is The Iliad a bookend around the pipeline, or the encompassing quest a system undertakes to become enrolled? (enum: the-encompassing-quest | a-bookend | a-runtime-orchestrator)
Is the new documentation/reference stage (order 5) enforced (NORMATIVE)?
Does presence in the repository make a system an enrolled part of The Iliad?

authority_anchor.record: workflow.json#quest_premise (enrollment earned by traversal; AM-40-deferred ai-forge/forge/saas-forge present but NOT enrolled)

queries.query: Does this workflow record itself enforce the stage order?

authority_anchor.record: workflow.json (ADVISORY; it authority-LINKS the NORMATIVE iliad invariants rather than enforcing)
